## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? Keep this short but specific. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Build, CI, or release

## Context

<!-- Link related issues or explain the user problem this solves. Use "Closes #123" when appropriate. -->

## How to review

<!-- Call out the most important files, decisions, tradeoffs, or areas where you want focused feedback. -->

## Testing

<!-- Describe what you ran. If you skipped something, say why. -->

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm docs:build`
- [ ] Manual check, if relevant:

## Screenshots or recordings

<!-- Add before/after screenshots or recordings for visual changes. Delete this section if it does not apply. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] Public API changes are documented.
- [ ] Tests or examples cover the changed behavior where practical.
- [ ] Visual or interaction changes were checked in at least one browser.
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary and explained.
